hero.headline:
Planning. Building.
Managing. Done Right.
hero.subtitle: Professional project planning, construction management, and interior design services you can trust.

about.label: About us
about.text1: Uniprix Investment is a Construction and Project management company specializing in project Planning, Construction, Interior designs, and Renovation and Property management services.
about.text2: We believe every successful Construction project starts with proper planning from Site Visits, Project designs to construction, focusing on Accuracy, Quality control, Efficient and Execution at every stage.

items.title: Project Planning & Management
items.desc: We handle the planning, coordination, and control of your project from start to finish. Our structured approach ensures clear timelines, controlled costs, and smooth execution at every stage.

items.title: Construction & Site Supervision
items.desc: We provide hands-on site supervision to ensure construction is carried out according to approved designs, quality standards, and safety requirements.

items.title: Interior Design
items.desc: We design functional, comfortable, and modern interior spaces that reflect your lifestyle and purpose. Every detail is planned to balance aesthetics and practicality.

items.title: Renovation & Remodeling
items.desc: We help upgrade, redesign, or improve existing spaces while maintaining structural integrity and enhancing value.

whyChooseUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Choosing the right partner makes all the difference. We combine proper planning, hands-on supervision, and clear communication to deliver projects with confidence and quality.

features.title: Structured Project Planning
features.desc: We design every project carefully to avoid delays, reduce risks, and ensure smooth execution.

features.title: Hands-On Site Supervision
features.desc: Our technical team is actively involved on site, ensuring proper standards, and timelines are followed.

features.title: Quality-Focused Execution
features.desc: We prioritize durability, functionality, and attention to detail at every stage of construction and design.

features.title: Transparent Process
features.desc: Clear communication, defined scopes, and professional coordination to keep clients informed and confident.

features.title: Client-Centred Approach
features.desc: We listen, advise honestly, and tailor solutions to match your goals, budget, and long-term vision.

testimonialsSection.heading: What Our Clients Say
testimonialsSection.subheading: Real feedback from people we have worked with across Uganda.

reviews.name: John Mukasa
reviews.text: Uniprix handled our office renovation with professionalism and precision. They delivered on time and kept us informed every step of the way.

reviews.name: Sarah Nalubega
reviews.text: The interior design team transformed our home beyond expectations. Great attention to detail and very client-focused throughout the project.

reviews.name: David Otieno
reviews.text: From planning to execution, Uniprix Investment showed true expertise. Our commercial building was completed within budget and on schedule.

reviews.name: Grace Apio
reviews.text: Reliable, honest, and skilled. I highly recommend Uniprix for any construction or renovation work. They genuinely care about quality.

reviews.name: Robert Ssemakula
reviews.text: Excellent project management from start to finish. The site visits were thorough and the team communicated clearly throughout.

cta.heading: Planning to build or invest? Let's get it right from the start.

mainSection.heading: We help clients plan better, build smarter, and manage projects with confidence.
mainSection.text1: Uniprix Investment is a Construction and Project management company specializing in project Planning, Construction, Interior designs, and Renovation and Property management services.
mainSection.text2: We believe every successful Construction project starts with proper planning from Site Visits, Project designs to construction, focusing on Accuracy, Quality control, Efficient and Execution at every stage.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text1: To provide professional project planning, construction, interior design and Property Management services that deliver quality, and efficiency.
mission.text2: We are committed to managing every project with accuracy, transparency, and attention to detail, ensuring our clients' ideas are transformed into well-executed and lasting developments.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted and respectable construction property Management partner, known for reliable project management, quality execution, and a client-focused approach that adds long-term value to every investment.

items.title: Professionalism
items.desc: We uphold high standards in Plan Designs, Construction and Property Management ensuring execution at every stage of a project.

items.title: Quality & Attention to Detail
items.desc: We prioritize durability, functionality, and finishing, ensuring every detail meets approval standards.

items.title: Transparency & Accountability
items.desc: We maintain clear communication, honest advice, and responsible project coordination.

items.title: Client-Centered Approach
items.desc: We listen, understand our clients' goals, to tailor make solutions that align with their vision and budget.

items.title: Integrity & Reliability
items.desc: We deliver on our commitments, manage projects with consistency and trust.
